use_cases: Display travel destinations with image backgrounds in listing grids
Show destination recommendations with category and title labels
Create interactive hotel or tour package cards with like functionality
Build travel inspiration sections with hover animation effects
Generate destination discovery interfaces for booking platforms
ai_summary: A destination card component designed for travel and discovery interfaces. Features a full-bleed background image with smooth scale animation on hover, category badge, title, and interactive like button with Heart icon. Built with shadcn/ui utilities including CVA for variant handling and forwardRef for ref forwarding. The card uses GPU-accelerated transforms and transitions for 60fps performance, making it suitable for mobile and desktop travel booking or discovery applications.
